taxon.author: (Emerton, 1875)
taxon.distribution: North America, Caribbean, Brazil, Argentina. Introduced to Pacific Is., Galapagos, Macaronesia, Britain, Spain, France, Italy, Israel, Japan

referenceObject.reference: Emerton, J. H. (1875). Notes on spiders from caves in Kentucky, Virginia and Indiana. American Naturalist 9(5): 278-281, pl. 1. doi: 10.1086/271488
